calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT .
Off Calendar May-28-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Gerchow, Deputy City Attorney, 415.554.3800, for defendant City and County of San Francisco; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS THE SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTATION AGENCY) MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Maria Viscio #12353.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Establishing Admissions
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Bradley A. Russi, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, CCSF, Tel. 415.554.3964, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The moving party appeared at the hearing. The matter was discussed. For good cause shown, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion For Order Establishing Admissions is granted. CCSF's First Requests For Admissions (Set One) served on December 4, 2013, are deemed admitted. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Philip M. Andersen; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Establishing Admissions
Off Calendar Feb-14-2014 Continued To Feb-26-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Order Establishing Admissions is continued on the court's own motion to February 26, 2014. Judge Pro Tem: Ernst Halperin; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
